results.title: Tyler Robinson defense seeks contempt ruling over prosecutor comments in Charlie Kirk case
results.description: The legal defense team for the man accused of killing Charlie Kirk want a judge to hold prosecutors in contempt for comments they made in the media about bullet fragments recovered from Kirk's body.

results.title: AG Ken Paxton blocked from suing Democratic donor platform ActBlue
results.description: By Eleanor Klibanoff, The Texas Tribune April 20, 2026 Attorney General Ken Paxton must drop his lawsuit against ActBlue, the political donations platform primarily used by Democratic candidates, a Boston federal judge ruled Thursday in a decision that cited the Texas Republican’s “well-known history of filing retaliatory lawsuits.” ActBlue sued Paxton in early May, alleging...

results.title: EMERGENCE | The Exceptional Poor and Selective Empathy: Reflecting on the Tragedy of Rene Baterbonia
results.description: DAVAO CITY (MindaNews /12 June 2026) – ​The death of a student is a quiet horror every educator dreads. In the medical school where I teach, our institutional reflex to tragedy is swift, quiet, and unconditioned by blame: when a foreign student under our care tragically drowned, the priority was immediate, seamless assistance to the [...]

results.title: new Zealand great Kane Williamson retires from international cricket
results.description: Kane Williamson, New Zealand's all-time leading run-scorer, retires from international cricket at 35, concluding a 16-year career with 19,346 runs.

results.title: Timmy, Germany's humpback whale, likely lived for only 5 days after controversial rescue effort
results.description: The humpback whale that kept Germany spellbound for months likely lived for roughly five days after the final controversial rescue attempt failed to guide it back to its natural habitat in the Atlantic Ocean, officials said Friday.
